lane.title: 11 Reel Making
lane.last_task: Take over reel-making lane and verify local/fleet render stack
lane.last_summary: Read the Claude reel-making handoff, local HE Remotion engine, HE raw-clip workflow, CLIP-INTELLIGENCE, May 25 classification, MENU, FILMING-GUIDE, and VIDEO-CREATIVE-SPINE. Verified hn-rtx-worker over Tailscale: Ubuntu Linux, RTX 3060 12GB, NVIDIA driver 595.71.05/CUDA 13.2, ffmpeg h264_nvenc/hevc_nvenc/av1_nvenc present, 1s h264_nvenc smoke test passed. Worker already has /home/nihaf/hn-video-workspace/he-video-engine and HE-Raw-Clips, but npm/npx is absent and node_modules/.bin/remotion is not currently runnable; existing scripts render with libx264 unless changed. Recommended repeatable Tier-1 template: tandoori_tikka_food_conviction using safe exact tandoori/tikka footage only.
lane.next_action: Build the Tandoori/Tikka Food Conviction reel template first: H10 fire hook -> Z08 tandoor process -> H34 tandoori plate -> H40 tikka plate -> H49 tandoori plate -> Z05 storefront -> FollowCTA/Get Directions. Create storyboard/contact sheet, render MP4, QA 1080x1920 H.264, first-frame nonblank, text/CTA safe zones, and footage honesty. Do not use ghee rice candidates IMG_0435/0449/0476 or butter-chicken candidates until Nihaf confirms exact identity.
lane.mutation_status: Read-only local/fleet verification plus memory sync only; no reel rendered/exported/posted, no ad spend, no POS/Odoo, WABA, aggregator, PiSignage, customer-facing, or HN checkout mutation. SSH known_hosts accepted hn-rtx-worker Tailscale key and /tmp NVENC smoke file was removed.
lane.proof: Local files read: /Users/nihaf/Documents/Tech.nosync/he-video-engine, /Users/nihaf/Documents/HE-Raw-Clips/{CLAUDE.md,CLIP-INTELLIGENCE.md,NEW-BATCH-2026-05-25-CLASSIFICATION.md,MENU.md,FILMING-GUIDE.md,VIDEO-CREATIVE-SPINE.md}. Worker proof: nvidia-smi showed RTX 3060 12GB; ffmpeg encoders showed h264_nvenc/hevc_nvenc/av1_nvenc; /tmp h264_nvenc smoke returned NVENC_SMOKE_OK.
lane.live_ids: hn-rtx-worker 100.107.54.16; GPU NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3060; Google Chrome 149.0.7827.114; Node v22.22.1
lane.rollback: No product/customer mutation to roll back. Remove ~/.ssh/known_hosts hn-rtx-worker entry only if Tailscale host identity is later found wrong.
